info.title: telemarketing-saas-be
info.description: 多租户电销管理 SaaS (Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1)

id.description: 批次主键(UUID)，同时作为 lead_assignments.batch_id

action.description: assign=分配 / reassign=改派 / recycle=回收公海 / claim=自领 / status-change=批量改状态

fromUserId.description: 统一来源(单条/全公海填实际值；批量混合为 null)

toUserId.description: 目标归属人(退回公海/无归属变更为 null)

toStatus.description: 仅 action=status-change 时记新状态(取值同 leads.status: pending/assigned/following/converted/invalid)

skipDetail.description: 跳过原因细分(已为对象，前端直接 map 渲染)：alreadyOwned / notStale / notInvalid / blocklisted

action.description: 明细动作(头表 status-change 不写明细)

fromUserId.description: 原归属(退回公海为 null)

toUserId.description: 新归属(退回公海为 null)

tags.name: Options
tags.description: 下拉选项（前端筛选框专用）

200.description: paginated; each item includes userCount and leadCount (non-deleted users/leads per tenant)

423.description: FORCE_CHANGE_PASSWORD (global auth middleware: returned by all protected routes when user.must_reset_password=1)

get.summary: Assignment batch feed (TA/TM; paginated, 1 row per operation)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: 排序字段，前缀 - 表倒序，如 sort=-createdAt；可逗号分隔多字段

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: 按批次 id 精确匹配(通用查询 DSL：默认 eq；支持 id__in=a,b)

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: 按动作过滤(通用查询 DSL)

parameters.name: operatorId
parameters.description: 按操作人 ID 过滤(通用查询 DSL：默认 eq；支持 operatorId__in=a,b)

parameters.name: fromUserId
parameters.description: 按统一来源用户 ID 过滤(默认 eq)

parameters.name: toUserId
parameters.description: 按目标归属用户 ID 过滤(默认 eq)

parameters.name: toStatus
parameters.description: 按目标状态过滤(仅 action=status-change 有值；取值同 leads.status: pending/assigned/following/converted/invalid)

parameters.name: createdAt
parameters.description: 按创建时间区间过滤。通用查询 DSL 日期操作符后缀：createdAt__gte=起, createdAt__lte=止(epoch秒或 YYYY-MM-DD)；或 createdAt__between=起~止。注意：不接受 createdAt__from/__to

200.description: 分配批次历史(分页)，封装于标准信封 { success, data: { items:[AssignmentBatch], total, page, size, pages } }。每次操作 1 行(批量分配 1000 条=1 行)，读 lead_assignment_batches 头表。支持通用查询 DSL(§9.4)：action / operatorId / fromUserId / toUserId / toStatus / createdAt 过滤。

schema.description: 按明细动作过滤(通用查询 DSL)
按线索 ID 过滤明细
按目标归属人过滤明细

200.description: 批次明细下钻(分页)，封装于标准信封 { success, data: { batch:AssignmentBatch, items:[Assignment], total, page, size, pages } }。batch 为头表行(skipDetail 已为对象)，items 为当前页 lead_assignments 明细。支持通用查询 DSL(§9.4)：action / leadId / toUserId 过滤；默认按 createdAt 倒序。

404.description: 批次不存在(或不属于当前租户)

post.summary: Add to blocklist (TA; auto-cancels pending schedules)
Create call (idempotent; optional content→atomic followup REQ-04)

parameters.name: erased
parameters.description: PIPL erase filter: 0=only non-erased (recommended), 1=only erased, omitted=no filter (erased empty rows mixed in; customers keep deletedAt so erased rows stay in list)

200.description: paginated (masked); each item carries erasedAt (null=not erased, unix seconds=erased)
detail with source lead+followups; carries erasedAt (null=not erased, unix seconds=erased)
erased; body: { id, erased: true, erasedAt: unix seconds } (deletedAt preserved, so erased row stays in list)

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: TE scope=mine(默认); scope=public 需 allowSelfClaim(REQ-02); TM/TA 可用 all

parameters.name: erased
parameters.description: PIPL erase filter: 0=only non-erased (recommended), 1=only erased, omitted=no filter (erased empty rows mixed in)

200.description: paginated (masked); each item carries erasedAt (null=not erased, unix seconds=erased)

staleDays.description: only leads in pool > N days

200.description: detail with timeline; carries erasedAt (null=not erased, unix seconds=erased)

lead.description: 线索对象（含 categoryId，前端用 GET /api/tenant/options/categories 映射分类名）

followups.description: 跟进记录列表（按 createdAt 倒序，含 callId 可关联通话）

calls.description: 该线索最近 5 条通话记录（按 startedAt 倒序）；更多请调 GET /api/tenant/calls?leadId=

schedules.description: 该线索最近 5 条日程（按 scheduledAt 倒序，含 pending/completed/cancelled 全部未删）；更多请调 GET /api/tenant/schedules?leadId=

post.summary: Assign lead to user (TA/TM; auto-migrates pending schedules)

200.description: 分配记录列表，封装于标准信封 { success, data: { items:[Assignment], total, page, size, pages } }；每条记录含 batchId 字段，同一批操作共享同一 UUID、单条操作为独立 UUID。

action.description: assign=分配 / reassign=改派 / recycle=回收公海 / claim=自领

fromUserId.description: 原归属(退回公海为 null)

toUserId.description: 新归属(退回公海为 null)

batchId.description: 批次标识；同一批操作(如批量分配100条)共享同一 UUID，单条操作各自独立 UUID

post.summary: Self-claim lead from pool (if allowSelfClaim enabled)

200.description: erased; body: { id, erased: true, erasedAt: unix seconds }

post.summary: Complete a call on a lead (atomic call_records + optional followup; idempotent by externalCallId)

201.description: call created (with followupId/followupCreated when content provided)

200.description: idempotent update when externalCallId already exists (followupId null)

patch.summary: Edit follow-up content (REQ-01; TE 5min own, TM/TA any)

delete.summary: Soft-delete follow-up (REQ-01; TE own only, TM/TA any)

post.summary: Reactivate invalid lead (TA/TM; moves to pending)

get.summary: 分类下拉选项 (id + name, sorted by sort, limit 100)
项目下拉选项 (id + name, limit 100)
快捷备注下拉选项 (id + content + type, 全量返回前端自行筛选, sorted by sort, limit 100)

200.description: 快捷备注选项数组（含 type 字段，前端按 type 筛选）

get.summary: 员工下拉选项 (id + name + role, limit 100)
List quick notes (TA/TM/TE; sorted by sort+createdAt)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: 场景分类过滤（闭集枚举）；不传返回全部；非法值 → 400

parameters.name: type__in
parameters.description: 逗号分隔多类过滤，如 followup,schedule；非法值 → 400

post.summary: Create quick note (TA; no PATCH, delete+recreate)

type.description: 场景分类闭集枚举；缺省 followup；传其他值 → 400

get.summary: List schedules (JOIN leads, phone masked for TE/TM)
